name: Guisado De Puerco Con Tomatillos (Pork Stew W
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Tomatillos, chopped, fresh or canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and discard any remaining fat from the pork shoulder. Cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a large, heavy pot or skillet over medium-high heat. Add meat in batches until lightly browned on all sides. Remove the meat to a plate and set aside; leave the drippings in the pan.
3. Add chopped onion to the pan and cook until softened, stirring occasionally, for about 7 minutes.
4. Return the meat to the pot and stir in minced garlic, chopped or canned tomatillos, diced green chiles, dried marjoram leaves, chopped cilantro, and water. Season with salt to taste.
5. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat until the pork is tender when pierced, about 1 hour. Remove any foam or fat that rises to the surface.
6. Spoon the stew into serving bowls and garnish with sour cream and fresh cilantro sprigs before serving.
